name: Kimetsu No Yaiba RPG [REMAKE]
description:
DEMON SLAYER: Breath of the Blade RPG [COMPLETE REMAKE - REFORMED 100K TOKEN LOREBOOK]

THE 8K TOKEN TAISHO NIGHTMARE | REBUILT FROM THE GROUND UP

Demons hunt in darkness. The Corps fights in shadow. Will you master the Breathing Styles—or fall to fangs? Welcome to the platform's most authentic Demon Slayer RPG, completely remade with over almost 8,000 permanent tokens of brutal mechanics and the 100,000 TOKEN LOREBOOK —now with massively improved gameplay systems! Experience Taisho Era Japan where the Demon Slayer Corps wages a secret war against Muzan Kibutsuji's legion of man-eating demons.

You will navigate Mt. Sagiri's brutal training grounds, investigate blood-soaked villages, defend against Twelve Kizuki elites, and navigate the Corps' hidden infrastructure from Butterfly Mansion to forbidden swordsmith villages. This simulation ensures CRITICAL PLAYER AGENCY—the AI controls the world, never your character—while NPCs pursue independent vendettas of duty, survival, or demonic hunger. Every Breathing Form mastered, every demon slain, every mission survived reshapes the war's desperate balance.

WHAT MAKES THIS REMAKE SUPERIOR?

This isn't an update—it's a complete demolition and reconstruction of the original bot:

  • Legendary 100K Lorebook, Better Integration: Every canon character (Tanjiro, Nezuko, Rengoku, Tengen, Shinobu, Muzan, Akaza, and hundreds more), every Breathing Style (Water, Flame, Thunder, Stone, Serpent, Insect, and derivatives), every Blood Demon Art, every major battle—now with seamless mechanical integration instead of just lore reference.

  • Visceral Combat Overhaul: Stamina drains realistically during Forms. Wounds persist and fester without treatment. Demon regeneration described grotesquely. Death is permanent and brutal. No more vague combat—every slash, every regenerating limb, every desperate gasp is rendered in savage detail.

  • True NPC Independence: Hashira don't wait for you—they hunt demons relentlessly. Demons scheme for power. Kakushi clean battlefields whether you're there or not. The original had NPCs react; this remake has them live and pursue agendas independently.

  • Consequence System That Matters: Failed missions = village massacres with body counts. Demon escapes = they grow stronger and return. Break Corps code = expulsion or execution. Your reputation actually affects mission assignments, Hashira mentorship, and demon targeting.

  • Refined Role System: Six detailed roles (Mizunoto Recruit, Kinoe Slayer, Tsuguko, Kakushi, Reformed Demon, Custom) with specific inventories, starting locations, and NPC reaction modifiers. The original was generic; this is mechanically precise.

  • Breathing Style Mastery: Probabilistic breakthroughs (d6 5-6 after training or extreme duress), stamina management, Form progression tracked. The original mentioned Breathing Styles; this remake makes you earn them.

CORE MECHANICS: THE CORPS ENGINE

This RPG runs on a unified World State Tracker governing consequences across seven lethal systems:

  • Stamina & Breathing System: Every Form drains stamina at different rates (basic Forms minimal, advanced Forms heavy). Zero stamina = vulnerability, Form failure
creator: Rfergeegr
